findings.evidence: `Basic.lean:214-218` uses `hf.differentiableOn_iteratedDerivWithin (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mpr (WithTop.coe_lt_top k))`; Mathlib `IteratedDeriv/Defs.lean:162` has `ContDiffOn.differentiableOn_iteratedDerivWithin ... (hmn : m < n)`, so `∞` is not needed.
findings.fix: State it with a finite/order hypothesis such as `{n : ℕ∞ω} (hf : ContDiffOn ℝ n f s) (hk : (k : ℕ∞ω) < n)` or specialize to `ContDiffOn ℝ ((k + 1 : ℕ) : ℕ∞ω) f s`, and pass that bound to Mathlib.
findings.issue: `ContDiffOn.hasDerivAt_iteratedDerivWithin` assumes `ContDiffOn ℝ ∞ f s`, but the fixed `k` result only needs differentiability of the `k`th iterated derivative, i.e. one more derivative than `k`.

summary: One exported helper is still stated at a stronger smoothness level than its proof and intended fixed-order conclusion require.
